zh.lifeSummary: Joanna Blachworth是Richard de Blachworth的女兒，於1351年出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德巴可沃斯。她和Sir William Swanland至少有1個女兒。她去世於1425年在英國英格蘭越可爾 易亞斯特 利丁斯萬藍德享年74歲。

nameMeanings.name: Joanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form, Io(h)anna, of Greek Iōanna, the feminine equivalent of Iōannēs ( see John ). In the New Testament, this name is borne by a woman who was one of Jesus's followers (Luke 8:3; 24:10). She was the wife of the steward of the household of King Herod Antipas. The name was regularly used throughout the Middle Ages in most parts of Europe as a feminine equivalent of John , but in England it has only been in common use as a vernacular given name since the 19th century. Celebrated British bearers of the name include the novelist Joanna Trollope ( b. 1943 ), the actress Joanna Lumley ( b. 1946 ), and the concert pianist Joanna McGregor ( b. 1959 ).

en.lifeSummary: Joanna Blachworth was born in 1351, in Backworth, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Richard de Blachworth. She had at least 1 daughter with Sir William Swanland. She died in 1425, in Swanland, Yorkshire East Riding, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 74.

ko.Swanland, Yorkshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 스완랜드
ko.lifeSummary: Joanna Blachworth(은)는 1351년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 바ck워스에서 Richard de Blachworth의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Sir William Swanland(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1425년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 스완랜드에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.
